title: Reset your password
description: How to reset your WagerProof password if you've forgotten it.

steps.title: Tap 'Forgot Password'
steps.description: You'll find this link below the password field.

steps.title: Enter your email
steps.description: Type the email address associated with your account.

steps.title: Check your inbox
steps.description: Look for a password reset email from WagerProof. Click the link to set a new password.

content.text: If you signed up with Google, you don't have a WagerProof password. Use 'Continue with Google' to sign in instead.
If you don't receive the reset email within a few minutes, check your spam/junk folder. If it's still not there, contact support@wagerproof.bet.
